name: Typewriter
description: Per-character stepped reveal that types each glyph in sequence. No interpolation — characters pop into existence at discrete intervals. Reads as mechanical, editorial, or terminal-style.
notes: Pair with a blinking caret element if you want the full terminal feel. The 50ms stagger lands around 1200 chars/min — fast but legible. Increase to 80-100ms if you want a deliberate typing pace.
